commands.cmd: echo | openssl s_client -connect $DOMAIN:443 -servername $DOMAIN 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -ext subjectAltName
commands.comment: SAN entries -- reveals other domains on the same cert
negotiated protocol version and cipher suite

commands.cmd: echo | openssl s_client -connect $DOMAIN:443 -servername $DOMAIN -tls1 2>&1 | grep -q 'handshake failure' && echo 'TLS 1.0: disabled (good)' || echo 'TLS 1.0: ENABLED (bad)'
echo | openssl s_client -connect $DOMAIN:443 -servername $DOMAIN -tls1_1 2>&1 | grep -q 'handshake failure' && echo 'TLS 1.1: disabled (good)' || echo 'TLS 1.1: ENABLED (bad)'

commands.comment: upcoming cert expirations across all issued certs
